subcodes.first_line: Thy name hath been mentioned before the Divine Throne; wherefore the Most Exalted Pen floweth and moveth in thy name. This is a great bounty, shouldst thou recognize its worth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمت لدی العرش مذکور لذا قلم اعلی باسمت جاری و ساری هذا فضل کبیر ان اعرف قدره
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
